name: vercel-ai.streamObject
description: Vercel AI SDK `streamObject` (v4+ naming, default `object` mode). The wrapper persists the FINAL assembled object in `output.object` (awaited from `response.object` after the stream finishes), plus `usage` with `inputTokens`/`outputTokens` and any populated v4+ response fields. Partial deltas are NOT persisted (the SDK chooses the consolidated view to keep the persisted sample meaningful).

input.prompt: Generate a 3-question quiz on Edinburgh trivia.

questions.q: What is Princes Street Gardens built on top of?
